data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. SPARKLING SUE overcame a second row draw to return to the winners' list last time out, getting home by a head at Narrabri on Sunday. The ace draw gives her the chance to make it two on the bounce. 3. SPOOKY ART has been knocking on the door for a while and went close again last time, finishing second and just a head from Sparkling Sue at Narrabri. Draws well so could turn the tables. 9. TASMANS DELIGHT draws on the back row but is working up to a win having produced a good effort last time out when runner-up at Narrabri. Should run a big race. 2. BELLRIVERGIRL was midfield from the back row last start but led to win easily prior so is better served by this barrier.","runners":[1,3,9,2],"exclusive":false}
